title: Receipt
description: Transaction receipt read from the station via BLE characteristic FFF6 (Read). Contains the complete record of a completed service session for offline reconciliation. v0.4.2: outer wrapper includes offlinePassId / userId / deviceId for symmetry with the signed inner body (06-security.md §6.2 receipt_fields).

offlinePassId.description: OfflinePass identifier used to authorize this service. Matches the value signed into receipt.data per 06-security.md §6.2 (v0.4.2).

userId.description: User subject identifier. Matches the value signed into receipt.data per 06-security.md §6.2 (v0.4.2).

deviceId.description: Device identifier from the BLE Hello / OfflinePass binding. Matches the value signed into receipt.data per 06-security.md §6.2 (v0.4.2).

startedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the service started

endedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the service ended

durationSeconds.description: Total duration of the service in seconds

meterValues.description: Final meter readings from the completed service

txCounter.description: Monotonically increasing transaction counter for chain integrity
